title: Lifestyle Writer
description:
Are you passionate about capturing the essence of Singapore’s hyper-local experiences? Confirm Good is looking for talented Lifestyle Content Writers to inspire our readers with witty, engaging, and SEO-optimized content. If you have a flair for words, an eye for photography, and love staying on top of the latest trends in food, fashion, travel, and culture, we could be the perfect platform for your creativity.


About the Role: We’re seeking writers who can blend insight with inspiration, attracting readers through captivating writing and visuals. As a Lifestyle Content Writer, you’ll have the chance to dive into Singapore’s vibrant lifestyle scene, uncover hidden gems, and cover events on behalf of the Company.


Responsibilities:

  • Write high-quality, SEO-optimized content including reviews, list articles, interviews, and opinion pieces (without Chat GPT/AI platforms)
  • Maintain and update existing website articles, including image curation and formatting.
  • Generate fresh story ideas, explore unique angles, and inspire the audience with innovative content.
  • Report and produce impactful lifestyle articles on topics like food, events, entertainment, and travel.
  • Capture professional-quality photographs to complement your writing.
  • Translate content for social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Telegram).
  • Manage content calendar, Telegram media scheduling and postings.
  • Attend press events, conferences, tastings, and previews to gather first-hand insights and experiences.
  • Grow the Editorial team and platform subscribers.

Requirements:

  • A keen awareness of lifestyle news and trends—You’re the heartbeat of the latest happenings.
  • Strong, creative writing style with wit, clarity, and expertise.
  • Detail-oriented, good work ethic and committed to editorial integrity.
  • Good photographic eye for capturing moments that enhance storytelling.
  • Proficient in SEO-optimized writing.
  • Enjoys a start-up, fast-paced environment.
  • Onsite.

Please provide a portfolio showcasing your writing for review.


(Fresh Grads / Candidates without experience are welcome to apply through our Internship Conversion Program.)


This is your chance to make an impact and inspire millions through our platform. Apply now to join the team at Confirm Good and bring Singapore’s unique stories to life!

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
